scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (ua && !ua.startsWith('pnpm')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); } require('fs').rmSync('package-lock.json', {force:true}); require('fs').rmSync('yarn.lock', {force:true});"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
